data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of invoice payment with net-30 terms. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API interactions or validations that confirm the functionality of invoice payment terms, leading to an inconclusive status. Specifically, the linked use cases mention payment terms but lack direct evidence of how the system handles these terms in practice, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the API handling invoice payment terms such as net-30.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for invoice payment terms
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the handling of invoice payment terms.
